summary: Design Approval Gate Phase 1 testing completed successfully. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - DesignApprovalPanel renders on ProjectDetails page with all 3 gated milestones (Design Meeting 2, Design Meeting 3, Pre-Production Sign-Off). DesignSubmissionsQueue renders on DesignManagerDashboard. Submit modal with file upload, checklist, and notes fields working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/design-approval/gated-milestones returns 3 milestones with checklist counts
Backend: GET /api/design-approval/gated-milestones returns submission statuses (pending_review, approved, rejected, revision_required)
Backend: GET /api/design-approval/checklist/design_meeting_2 returns 6 checklist items
Backend: GET /api/design-approval/checklist/design_meeting_3_final returns 6 checklist items
Backend: GET /api/design-approval/checklist/pre_production_signoff returns 6 checklist items
Backend: GET /api/design-approval/checklist/invalid_key returns 400
Backend: GET /api/projects/{id}/design-approval-status shows status for all 3 gated milestones
Backend: Test project has approved submission for design_meeting_2
Backend: GET /api/projects/{id}/design-submissions returns submissions grouped by milestone
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/design-submissions creates submission with pending_review status
Backend: Sequential submission control - blocks duplicate pending submissions (400 error)
Backend: GET /api/design-submissions/pending-approvals returns queue for managers
Backend: PUT /api/projects/{id}/design-submissions/{sid}/review rejects with review_notes
Backend: Rejection requires minimum 10 characters in review_notes
Backend: PUT /api/projects/{id}/design-submissions/{sid}/review approves submission
Backend: Milestone gate allows completion after approval (can_complete_milestone=true)
Backend: GET /api/projects/{id}/design-submissions/{sid} returns submission details with previous_submissions
Backend: Invalid project returns 404 for design-approval-status
Backend: Invalid milestone_key in submission returns 400
Frontend: Login with founder credentials successful
Frontend: Project Details page loads correctly
Frontend: DesignApprovalPanel renders on Project Details page
Frontend: Design Meeting 2 (3D Concept Freeze) milestone card displayed with Approved status
Frontend: Design Meeting 3 (Final Design Freeze) milestone card displayed with Approved status
Frontend: Pre-Production Sign-Off milestone card displayed with Not Submitted status
Frontend: Submit button visible for Not Submitted milestones
Frontend: Submit modal opens with correct title (Pre-Production Sign-Off)
Frontend: Submit modal has Design Files upload section
Frontend: Submit modal has Design Checklist section
Frontend: Submit modal has Design Notes field (required)
Frontend: Submit modal has Concept Summary field
Frontend: Submit modal has Constraints & Limitations field
Frontend: Submit modal has Submit for Approval button
Frontend: Submit modal has Cancel button
Frontend: Design Manager Dashboard loads correctly
Frontend: DesignSubmissionsQueue renders on Design Manager Dashboard
Frontend: 'No pending design approvals' message displayed when queue is empty
critical_code_review_comments: Backend design_approval_gate.py: Well-structured gated milestones config with 3 milestones and 6 checklist items each
Backend server.py (lines 16280-16800): Complete Design Approval Gate API implementation
Backend: Sequential submission control properly prevents multiple pending submissions for same milestone
Backend: Rejection validation requires minimum 10 characters in review_notes
Backend: Milestone gate integration in substage completion endpoint (lines 4552-4595)
Frontend DesignApprovalPanel.jsx: Comprehensive UI with milestone cards, status badges, submit/review modals
Frontend DesignSubmissionsQueue.jsx: Manager approval queue with deadline tracking
Frontend: Both components properly integrated in ProjectDetails.jsx and DesignManagerDashboard.jsx
seed_data_creation: Used existing test project proj_8aeea5f1 with approved submissions for design_meeting_2 and design_meeting_3_final. Created additional test submissions during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Design Approval Gate Phase 1 is fully functional. Backend APIs tested via pytest (19 tests passed). Frontend UI tested via Playwright. Test project proj_8aeea5f1 has: design_meeting_2 approved (v1), design_meeting_3_final approved (v2), pre_production_signoff not submitted. The DesignApprovalPanel is integrated in ProjectDetails.jsx (line 1108). The DesignSubmissionsQueue is integrated in DesignManagerDashboard.jsx (line 173). Gated milestones mapping: design_meeting_2 -> design_meeting_2, design_meeting_3 -> design_meeting_3_final, final_design_presentation -> pre_production_signoff.

gated_milestones_api.returns: 3 milestones (design_meeting_2, design_meeting_3_final, pre_production_signoff) with checklist counts

checklist_template_api.returns: 6 checklist items per milestone with key, label, required fields

create_submission_api.creates: Submission with pending_review status, version tracking, deadline from timeline

get_submissions_api.returns: Submissions grouped by milestone with latest_submission, total_versions, has_pending, has_approved

approval_status_api.returns: Status for all 3 gated milestones with can_complete_milestone flag

pending_approvals_api.returns: Queue for managers with pending_count, overdue_count, due_soon_count

milestone_gate_integration.behavior: Blocks milestone completion without approved submission, Admin/Founder can override

frontend_approval_panel.features: Milestone cards with status badges, Submit/Resubmit buttons, Review modal for managers

frontend_submissions_queue.features: Pending approvals list with deadline tracking, navigation to project
